summary: Workflow violates critical best practice: actions/checkout@v4 must pin to full 40-char SHA, not major version tag (line 14). Bash scripts follow best practices well (set -euo pipefail, proper quoting, clear error handling). Workflow test steps duplicate assertion patterns (workflow lines ~39-48 vs ~50-57 for package.json/requirements.txt compliance checks)—could factor into reusable bash script. Otherwise functional, readable, and maintainable. Before shipping, pin checkout action to SHA and consider consolidating repeated test step logic.
